subcodes.first_line: O thou who art bewildered in the divine wilderness! That which thou didst write became known and understood, and from its contents [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرگشته صحرای الهی آنچه مرقوم نموده بودید معلوم و مفهوم گردید و از مضامین
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for teaching, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @light and darkness, @love of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @firmness in the Covenant, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
